member.name: T:PublicKey
member.summary: A public key on the Hedera™ network.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a public key from a byte array.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromBytesDER(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a public key from a DER encoded byte array.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromBytesED25519(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a public key from a byte array.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromBytesECDSA(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a public key from a byte array.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Create a public key from a string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromStringED25519(System.String)
member.summary: Create a public key from a string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromStringECDSA(System.String)
member.summary: Create a public key from a string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromStringDER(System.String)
member.summary: Create a public key from a string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromAliasBytes(ByteString)
member.summary: The public key from an immutable byte string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.UnusableKey
member.summary: Returns an "unusable" public key. “Unusable” refers to a key such as an Ed25519 0x00000... public key, since it is (presumably) impossible to find the 32-byte string whose SHA-512 hash begins with 32 bytes of zeros.

member.name: M:PublicKey.FromSubjectKeyInfo(SubjectPublicKeyInfo)
member.summary: Create a public key from a subject public key info object.
member.param: the subject public key info object

member.name: M:PublicKey.IsECDSA
member.summary: Is this an ECDSA key?

member.name: M:PublicKey.IsED25519
member.summary: Is this an ED25519 key?

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToBytesDER
member.summary: Extract the DER represented as a byte array.
member.returns: the DER represented as a byte array

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToBytesRaw
member.summary: Extract the raw byte representation.

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToEvmAddress
member.summary: Converts the key to EVM address

member.name: M:PublicKey.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verify a signature on a message with this public key.
member.param: The array of bytes representing the message
The array of bytes representing the signature

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToSignaturePairProtobuf(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Serialize this key as a Proto.SignaturePair protobuf object

member.name: M:PublicKey.ExtractSignatureFromProtobuf(Proto.SignaturePair)
member.summary: Get the signature from a signature pair protobuf.

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToStringDER
member.summary: Extract the DER encoded string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToStringRaw
member.summary: Extract the raw string.

member.name: M:PublicKey.ToAccountId(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Create a new account id.

member.name: M:PublicKey.VerifyTransaction``1(Transaction{``0})
member.summary: Is the given transaction valid?
